title: Drone attack
description: The fuel crisis in the Russian Federation has already affected about 50 million Russians, - FT Izdanie writes that Ukrainian drones disabled from 20% to 40% of Russian oil processing. Key refineries, including the largest plant in Omsk, came under attack. By June 25, restrictions on the sale of fuel were introduced in almost 50 regions. About 35% of the population of the Russian Federation directly felt queues at gas stations, limits and shortages. One of the top managers...
description_en: The fuel crisis in the Russian Federation has already affected about 50 million Russians, - FT Izdanie writes that Ukrainian drones disabled from 20% to 40% of Russian oil processing. Key refineries, including the largest plant in Omsk, came under attack. By June 25, restrictions on the sale of fuel were introduced in almost 50 regions. About 35% of the population of the Russian Federation directly felt queues at gas stations, limits and shortages. One of the top managers...
description_uk: Топливный кризис в рф уже затронул около 50 млн россиян, - FT Издание пишет, что украинские дроны вывели из строя от 20% до 40% российской нефтепереработки. Под ударами оказались ключевые НПЗ, включая крупнейший завод в Омске. К 25 июня ограничения на продажу топлива ввели почти 50 регионов. Очереди на АЗС, лимиты и дефицит напрямую почувствовали около 35% населения рф. Один из топ-менеджеров...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Men charged in killing of Monaco bombing suspect ordered held in custody without bail. Kyiv's Pechersk District Court on July 9 ordered two men suspected of killing Anastasiia Berezovska, a suspect in the attempted assassination of businessman in Monaco, into pretrial detention for two months without bail.

title: 👀 The production of Patriot missiles in Ukraine can start in the...
title_en: 👀 The production of Patriot missiles in Ukraine can start in the...
title_uk: 👀 Виробництво ракет Patriot в Україні може початися в...
description: 👀 The production of Patriot missiles in Ukraine can start in the coming weeks, - Ministry of Defense of Poland Polish Minister of Defense Władysław Kosyniak-Kamysh said that the start of production will be possible with the participation of Poland, which received the status of one of the four NATO centers for the transfer of technologies and maintenance of Patriot missiles.
description_en: 👀 The production of Patriot missiles in Ukraine can start in the coming weeks, - Ministry of Defense of Poland Polish Minister of Defense Władysław Kosyniak-Kamysh said that the start of production will be possible with the participation of Poland, which received the status of one of the four NATO centers for the transfer of technologies and maintenance of Patriot missiles.
description_uk: 👀 Производство ракет Patriot в Украине может начаться уже в ближайшие недели, - Минобороны Польши Министр обороны Польши Владислав Косиняк-Камыш заявил, что запуск производства станет возможен при участии Польши, которая получила статус одного из четырех центров НАТО по передаче технологий и обслуживанию ракет Patriot.

title: 🤭It seems that the Su-35 fell victim to Russian maps. According to...
title_en: 🤭It seems that the Su-35 fell victim to Russian maps. According to...
title_uk: 🤭Схоже, Су-35 став жертвою російських карт. Згідно...
description: 🤭It seems that the Su-35 fell victim to Russian maps. According to OSINT analysts, the fighter jet fell only 42 km from the front. It is assumed that the pilot could be sure that he was far from the line of hostilities, orienting himself on the maps of the Ministry of Defense of the Russian Federation. And there, as you know, they like to "finish" new captured territories and pass off what they want as real.
description_en: 🤭It seems that the Su-35 fell victim to Russian maps. According to OSINT analysts, the fighter jet fell only 42 km from the front. It is assumed that the pilot could be sure that he was far from the line of hostilities, orienting himself on the maps of the Ministry of Defense of the Russian Federation. And there, as you know, they like to "finish" new captured territories and pass off what they want as real.
description_uk: 🤭Похоже, Су-35 стал жертвой российских карт По данным OSINT-аналитиков, истребитель упал всего в 42 км от фронта. Предполагают, что пилот мог быть уверен, что находится далеко от линии боевых действий, ориентируясь по картам минобороны рф. А там, как известно, любят «дорисовывать» новые захваченные территории и выдавать желаемое за действительное.

title: Minus 12 tankers, a tug, a dry cargo, an oil terminal and an...
title_en: Minus 12 tankers, a tug, a dry cargo, an oil terminal and an...
title_uk: Мінус 12 танкерів, буксир, суховантаж, нафтовий термінал і...
description: Minus 12 tankers, a tug, a dry cargo, an oil terminal and an ammunition warehouse: the General Staff summarized the results of the night shift. The vessels were used to supply Russian troops with fuel and transport oil to circumvent sanctions. In addition, the Yug Rus oil terminal in the Rostov region and the enemy's ammunition depot in the Sorokino district of the Luhansk region were hit.
description_en: Minus 12 tankers, a tug, a dry cargo, an oil terminal and an ammunition warehouse: the General Staff summarized the results of the night shift. The vessels were used to supply Russian troops with fuel and transport oil to circumvent sanctions. In addition, the Yug Rus oil terminal in the Rostov region and the enemy's ammunition depot in the Sorokino district of the Luhansk region were hit.
description_uk: Минус 12 танкеров, буксир, сухогруз, нефтяной терминал и склад боеприпасов: Генштаб подвел итоги ночной гойды Судна использовали для снабжения российских войск топливом и перевозки нефти в обход санкций. Кроме того, под удар попал нефтеналивной терминал «Юг Руси» в Ростовской области и склад боеприпасов противника в районе Сорокино Луганской области.

title: Kherson: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: He met with the Chairman of the Council of Ministers of Italy Giorgia Maloni. It's an important conversation. Informed about the situation in Ukraine. Russia does not stop shelling our cities and communities. Today there were ballistic strikes again, and attack drones were launched. Unfortunately, there are casualties in Kyiv, Kharkiv and Kherson. Russia took the lives of five people. My condolences to family and friends. We discussed the prospects of joint work in Europe on...

description_uk: Зустрівся з Головою Ради міністрів Італії Джорджею Мелоні. Важлива розмова. Поінформував про ситуацію в Україні. Росія не припиняє обстрілів наших міст і громад. Сьогодні знову були удари балістикою, запускали й ударні дрони. На жаль, є загиблі у Києві, Харкові та Херсоні. Росія забрала життя п’ятьох людей. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким.
